goal: Build a Python CLI tool that scans code files for common issues (security, performance, style) using regex and AST parsing. It generates a formatted report with severity levels and suggestions. No external dependencies required.
acceptance_criteria: CLI entry point (main.py) accepting directory path and optional filters.
Scanner module using regex and ast for security, performance, and style checks.
Report module (using rich or standard print) for formatted output with severity levels.
Unit tests covering regex patterns, AST parsing, and error handling (syntax errors).
Handle edge cases: empty directories, syntax errors in files, missing fields.
